title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build an agentic AI application using Claude Code across three interfaces: desktop app, terminal, and VS Code integration. The example application generates personalized resumes and cover letters with multiple themes and skill recommendations.
